name: 1500 FOLLOWERS // ANNOUNCEMENT
description:
Hello everyone! First of all I wanna say I'm super grateful for 1500 followers. Rest assured I will be making a PM bot to celebrate the ocassion for all my fellow sleeper agents but more importantly...

I will be making my first official OC series - Neo-LA.

1500 FOLLOWERS SERIES: NEO-LA

[All wonderful art credits go to: @Lewdicy on X]

[Original series idea by: @Lolud on JAI]

The series will feature 3 characters, all of different backgrounds. The series is set in the same universe as Mike Pondsmith's Cyberpunk, but is set 22 years in the future in the neighboring city (Neo-LA) instead of Night City.

I don't have a definitive release date, but I can tell you that 2/3 characters are fully completed. I will be releasing them all at once when they're complete. Until then, enjoy the rest of my bots!

Oh, and if theres stuff you wanna see in the meantime, just comment
creator: Path4474!
